display.purpose: Hero headings only — one per page. The 800 weight and -0.045em tracking make this the sharpest, most decisive element on any surface.

headline.purpose: Section headings. Clamp handles responsive; never use fixed px at this scale.

title.purpose: Component headings within feature cells, step titles, popup video titles.

body.purpose: All supporting copy. Max 65–75ch line length. Secondary/stone color — verify 4.5:1 contrast always.

label-mono.purpose: Exact machine-generated values only: timestamps, match counts, ordered step numbers. The font signals precision, not decoration.

shadows.name: product-demo-light
shadows.purpose: Extension popup preview on light background. Narrative shadow — frames the demo, not an interactive state.

shadows.name: product-demo-dark
shadows.purpose: Extension popup preview on dark background.

shadows.name: hover-lift
shadows.purpose: State-response shadow for interactive containers on hover. Appears only as a transition, never at rest.

motion.name: ease-state
motion.purpose: Default ease-out-expo for state transitions (hover, focus, active). 150ms.

motion.name: ease-reveal
motion.purpose: Reveal animations for section entrances. 200–350ms with stagger.

motion.name: ease-theme
motion.purpose: Background and color transitions for dark/light theme toggle. 250ms.

breakpoints.name: tablet
breakpoints.purpose: Hero grid collapses to single column, steps grid to 1-column

components.name: Primary Button (Hero)
components.description: Main CTA — drives Chrome extension install. Hero size used in hero section and footer CTA.
components.html: Add to Chrome — Free
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 13px 26px; border-radius: 6px; background: #FF4500; color: #fff; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.01em; text-decoration: none; white-space: nowrap; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1), transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #E03A00; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #FF450066; outline-offset: 3px; } .ds-btn-icon { flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary CTA — 'See how it works' scroll link, secondary actions.
components.html: See how it works
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 7px; padding: 13px 20px; border-radius: 6px; background: transparent; color: #6b6860; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; white-space: nowrap; border: 1px solid #e2e0db; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 150ms ease, color 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: #aaa9a3; color: #141412; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #FF450066; outline-offset: 3px; } .ds-btn-ghost-icon { flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Nav CTA Button
components.description: Compact primary button in sticky navigation.
components.html: Add to Chrome
components.css: .ds-btn-nav { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 6px 16px; border-radius: 5px; background: #FF4500; color: #fff; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none; white-space: nowrap; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-nav:hover { background: #E03A00; } .ds-btn-nav:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #FF450066; outline-offset: 3px; } .ds-btn-nav-icon { flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Filter Chip (Active)
components.description: Time-range filter pill in active/selected state. Used in extension popup.
components.css: .ds-chip-active { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 7px; border-radius: 4px; border: 1px solid #FF4500; background: #FF450018; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; color: #FF4500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease, border-color 150ms ease; user-select: none; }

components.name: Filter Chip (Inactive)
components.description: Time-range filter pill in resting/unselected state.
components.css: .ds-chip-inactive { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 7px; border-radius: 4px; border: 1px solid #e2e0db; background: transparent; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; color: #888; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease, border-color 150ms ease; user-select: none; } .ds-chip-inactive:hover { border-color: #aaa9a3; }

components.name: Search Input (Active)
components.description: Keyword search input in the extension popup — accent-tinted when a search term is entered.
components.css: .ds-input-active { padding: 6px 9px; border-radius: 4px; border: 1px solid #FF4500; background: #FF450018; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; color: #141412; line-height: 1.4; }

components.name: Search Input (Default)
components.description: Channel URL / keyword input at rest.
components.css: .ds-input-default { padding: 6px 9px; border-radius: 4px; border: 1px solid #e2e0db; background: #f4f3f1; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; color: #141412; line-height: 1.4; transition: border-color 150ms ease, background 150ms ease; } .ds-input-default:focus { border-color: #FF4500; background: #FF450018; outline: none; }

components.name: Feature Grid Cell
components.description: Feature list item — not a card. Uses border-top + border-right dividers, no background fill. Mono number accent.
components.html:
02

Clickable timestamps

Each result links directly to that second in the video. No manual seeking.
components.css: .ds-feature-cell { padding: 24px; border-top: 1px solid #e2e0db; border-right: 1px solid #e2e0db; } .ds-feature-num { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; color: #FF4500; letter-spacing: 0.05em; margin-bottom: 10px; } .ds-feature-title { margin: 0 0 6px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: #141412; line-height: 1.3; } .ds-feature-body { margin: 0; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; color: #6b6860; line-height: 1.65; }

components.name: Nav Bar
components.description: Sticky top navigation — 56px height, border-bottom only, logo + links + CTA.
components.html:
ClipChase
FeaturesHow it worksAdd to Chrome
components.css: .ds-nav { height: 56px; padding: 0 48px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; border-bottom: 1px solid #e2e0db; position: sticky; top: 0; background: #fafaf9; z-index: 10; } .ds-nav-brand { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; } .ds-logo { width: 24px; height: 24px; border-radius: 5px; background: #FF4500; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-nav-wordmark { font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: #141412; } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; gap: 16px; align-items: center; } .ds-nav-link { font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: #6b6860; text-decoration: none; transition: color 150ms ease; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #141412; } .ds-btn-nav { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 6px 16px; border-radius: 5px; background: #FF4500; color: #fff; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-nav:hover { background: #E03A00; }

narrative.overview:
ClipChase is a search tool — and this design system acts like one. No surface exists to add texture or warmth; every token earns its place by doing a specific job. The palette is a near-monochrome canvas with a single orange accent that means one thing: there is something here. The monospaced type says the same thing: this value is exact. The grid lines say it without type at all.

The system rejects the entire AI landing-page vocabulary: no cream/sand backgrounds as 'warmth,' no gradient text, no identical card grids, no hero metric blocks, no numbered eyebrows on every section as scaffolding.

The dual dark/light theme is earned: the extension popup lives on YouTube's dark UI, so dark mode is the tool's natural habitat.
keyCharacteristics: YouTube Ember (#FF4500) as the single accent — used on CTAs, match counts, timestamps, active states. Its rarity is its weight.
JetBrains Mono for precision signals only: timestamps, counts, sequential numbers. Never body text.
1px border dividers as structural grid — no card backgrounds for feature lists.
Near-zero motion at rest; purposeful motion on state change and reveal.
Comfortable and precise: enough breathing room to read confidently, tight enough to feel like a tool.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: YouTube Ember (#FF4500) is used on ≤15% of any screen surface. CTAs, active indicators, counts, the logo — that's the full list. Its rarity is the point.

rules.name: The Tint Cap Rule
rules.body: The light background (#fafaf9) already carries subtle warmth. Do not add more warm-tinted neutrals to the palette.

rules.name: The Mono as Signal Rule
rules.body: JetBrains Mono appears only where the value is machine-generated and exact: timestamps, match counts, sequential step numbers in actual ordered flows. Never in headings, body paragraphs, navigation, or CTAs.

rules.name: The Weight Contrast Rule
rules.body: Hierarchy is built on weight contrast (400 → 700 → 800), not on separate type families. Do not introduce a third family for display purposes.

rules.name: The Flat-by-Default Rule
rules.body: Resting surfaces carry no shadow. The extension popup preview is the one named exception — its shadow frames a product demonstration, not a template for other containers.

dos: Do use YouTube Ember (#FF4500) exclusively on CTAs, active states, match counts, and the logo mark.
Do use JetBrains Mono for timestamps, match counts, and sequential step numbers in genuine ordered flows — nowhere else.
Do use 1px border dividers as structural separators instead of card backgrounds.
Do verify contrast: stone (#6b6860) on almost-white (#fafaf9) is ~4.7:1 — the floor. Never go lighter.
Do animate with ease-out-expo at 150–250ms. Include prefers-reduced-motion alternatives for every animation.
Do use Framer Motion for orchestrated entrances and scroll-driven animations.
Do use text-wrap: balance on display and headline headings.
donts: Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with gradient background). Prohibited.
Don't use numbered labels (01/02/03) as section eyebrows on non-sequential sections.
Don't repeat identical card grids: icon + heading + text description, repeated without variation.
Don't introduce more warm tinting into the neutral palette.
Don't use hero metric blocks: big number, small label, supporting stats, gradient accent.
Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left > 1px as a colored accent).
Don't use generic SaaS copy — streamline, empower, supercharge, leverage, seamless.
Don't add ambient shadows to resting surfaces.
Don't set subheading text in mono without a precision rationale.
